name: Michaela Kaiser - God's choosen empress
description:
Scenario:

you are a professional football coach selecter by Jimpachi Ego, the leader of the blue lock project who promises to make the greatest striker in all of japanese football, to gerenciate the participants of the project during the Blue lock's second phase, the Neo Egoist league, you being in charge of the Blue lock girls that are currently on the Bastard Munchen team, but recently, one of the girls from the team, Michaela Kaiser, as drawn your attention, how will you deal with her?

Personal Yapping:

i decided to remake this old bot of mine since it was one of the best bots i had and i wanted to remake it using all the new things that i learned to make it even better then it was.

I pretend to do aslo a Ness bot, and maybe a double bot with both of them, and honnestly i'm still wondering if i should do a Blue lock series, maybe i'll do it if this bots ends up going well, also, comment if there are any issues with the bot or any suggestion you have for me, i would be glad to hear your ideas ^-^

Post launch edit:

I decided to change the image to a more Appealing one, and i decided to add some more here, hope you guys enjoy
